name: field service supervisors in construction managing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For field service supervisors in construction managing 5–15 projects/month, inconsistent compliance tracking causes regulatory penalties. We provide automated compliance checklists and reminders instead of manual checklist creation and reminders via email.

problem_solved: Ensuring compliance with safety regulations and standards.
features: manual entry for project-specific compliance items
